svg.title: Bijal Patel tagline
svg.desc: I turn messy, real-world data into clean pipelines, sharp models, and dashboards that actually get used.
svg.text: I turn messy, real-world data into clean pipelines, sharp models, and dashboards that actually get used.
From 1M+ row ETL workflows to Power BI dashboards adopted in production —
I close the gap between analysis and action.
